notes: === HOW TO ADD A JOURNALIST (News tab) ===
Copy any sources block, set name/url/active:true
Copy any podcastSources block, set name/url/active:true
To find RSS URL: go to podnews.net and search show name
=== HOW TO ADD A WATCHED VOICE (guest detection) ===
Copy any watchedVoices block. Set name and keywords array.
Keywords searched in episode titles + descriptions from ALL podcast feeds.
Works even for people with no RSS feed of their own.
You can add multiple keywords — last name, full name, nickname, show name, etc.
